<!-- 
This file contains the conference map and calendar for the research page.
To edit conference information:
1. Update the 'conferences' list in _conferences_data.py
2. Add, remove, or modify conference entries following the existing format
3. Each conference needs: name, location, lat, lon, start_date, end_date, type, and url
4. The map and table will automatically update based on this data

This file is included in research/index.qmd and renders at the bottom of the research page.
-->
## Conference Map and Calendar

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from _conferences_data import conference_abstract_deadlines, conferences
from IPython.display import display, HTML
import json


def get_conference_abstract_display(conference_url):
    return conference_abstract_deadlines.get((conference_url or "").rstrip("/"), {}).get("abstract_display", "TBD")


conference_project_data = [
    {
        "name": conf["name"],
        "url": conf.get("url", ""),
        "projects": [
            project_url.strip()
            for project_url in (conf.get("projects") or [])
            if isinstance(project_url, str) and project_url.strip()
        ],
        "abstract_display": get_conference_abstract_display(conf.get("url", "")),
    }
    for conf in conferences
    if conf.get("url")
]

display(HTML(f"""
<script id="research-index-conference-abstract-deadlines" type="application/json">
{json.dumps(conference_abstract_deadlines, ensure_ascii=True)}
</script>
<script id="research-index-conference-project-data" type="application/json">
{json.dumps(conference_project_data, ensure_ascii=True)}
</script>
"""))
```

### Calendar

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

from _conferences_data import conferences
from _callforpapers_data import call_for_papers, SPECIAL_CALL_DUE_DATES
from _nih_grant_deadlines_data import nih_grant_deadlines
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from IPython.display import display, HTML
import json

def create_fullcalendar_html(conferences, call_for_papers, nih_grant_deadlines):
    current_date = datetime.now()
    current_year = current_date.year
    fc_events = []

    # Colors
    CONF_COLOR   = "#0d6efd"
    PAPER_COLOR  = "#dc3545"
    ABS_BORDER_COLOR = "#0dcaf0"
    ABS_WINDOW_COLOR = "rgba(13,202,240,0.1)"

    # UT Austin Burnt Orange for NIH
    NIH_COLOR    = "#BF5700"
    NIH_BORDER   = "#8C3E00"

    # Emojis
    CONF_EMOJI  = "📅"
    ABS_EMOJI   = "📋"
    PAPER_EMOJI = "📝"
    NIH_EMOJI   = "🏛️"

    nih_url = "https://grants.nih.gov/grants-process/submit/submission-policies/standard-due-dates"

    def add_single_day_event(title, date_str, color, event_type, detail="", url="", note=""):
        fc_events.append({
            "title": title,
            "start": date_str,
            "backgroundColor": color,
            "borderColor": NIH_BORDER,
            "textColor": "#ffffff",
            "extendedProps": {
                "type": event_type,
                "detail": detail,
                "rowType": "nih",
                "url": url,
                "note": note,
            },
        })

    def add_series_dates(label, month_day_list, year, color, detail="", url="", note=""):
        for mm_dd in month_day_list:
            date_str = f"{year}-{mm_dd}"
            add_single_day_event(
                title=f"{NIH_EMOJI} {label}",
                date_str=date_str,
                color=color,
                event_type="NIH Standard Due Date",
                detail=detail,
                url=url,
                note=note,
            )

    # ---------------- Conferences ----------------
    for conf in conferences:
        end_dt = datetime.strptime(conf["end_date"], "%Y-%m-%d")
        fc_end = (end_dt + timedelta(days=1)).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")

        fc_events.append({
            "title": f"{CONF_EMOJI} {conf['name']}",
            "start": conf["start_date"],
            "end": fc_end,
            "color": CONF_COLOR,
            "extendedProps": {
                "type": conf.get("type", "Conference"),
                "detail": conf.get("location", ""),
                "rowType": "conference",
                "url": conf.get("url", ""),
            },
        })

        if conf.get("abstract_close"):
            close_dt = datetime.strptime(conf["abstract_close"], "%Y-%m-%d")
            open_dt  = datetime.strptime(conf["abstract_open"], "%Y-%m-%d") if conf.get("abstract_open") else None

            abstract_end   = (close_dt + timedelta(days=1)).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
            abstract_start = conf["abstract_open"] if open_dt else conf["abstract_close"]

            fc_events.append({
                "title": f"{ABS_EMOJI} Abstracts: {conf['name']}",
                "start": abstract_start,
                "end": abstract_end,
                "backgroundColor": ABS_WINDOW_COLOR,
                "borderColor": ABS_BORDER_COLOR,
                "textColor": "#055160",
                "extendedProps": {
                    "type": "Abstract Submission",
                    "detail": conf.get("location", ""),
                    "rowType": "abstract",
                    "url": conf.get("url", ""),
                    "note": conf.get("abstract_note", ""),
                },
            })

    # ---------------- Calls for Papers ----------------
    for paper in call_for_papers:
        if paper["due_date"] in SPECIAL_CALL_DUE_DATES:
            continue

        fc_events.append({
            "title": f"{PAPER_EMOJI} {paper['journal']}",
            "start": paper["due_date"],
            "color": PAPER_COLOR,
            "extendedProps": {
                "type": "Calls for Papers",
                "detail": paper.get("topic", ""),
                "rowType": "paper",
                "url": paper.get("website", ""),
            },
        })

    # ---------------- NIH Deadlines ----------------
    for year in [current_year, current_year + 1]:
        for item in nih_grant_deadlines:
            add_series_dates(
                label=item["label"],
                month_day_list=item["month_days"],
                year=year,
                color=NIH_COLOR,
                detail=item.get("detail", ""),
                url=nih_url,
                note=item.get("note", ""),
            )

    events_json = json.dumps(fc_events)
    initial_date = current_date.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")

    html = f"""
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.15/index.global.min.js"></script>

<style>
#fc-deadline-calendar {{ max-width:100%; margin:16px 0; }}

.fc-deadline-legend {{
display:flex;
flex-wrap:wrap;
gap:12px;
margin:4px 0 12px 0;
font-size:13px;
}}

.fc-deadline-legend span {{
display:flex;
align-items:center;
gap:5px;
}}

.fc-deadline-legend .swatch {{
width:12px;
height:12px;
border-radius:3px;
display:inline-block;
}}

#fc-deadline-calendar .fc-day-today .fc-daygrid-day-frame {{
background:#fff9c4 !important;
}}

#fc-deadline-calendar .fc-day-today .fc-daygrid-day-number {{
font-weight:bold;
color:#856404;
}}
</style>

<div class="fc-deadline-legend">
<span><span class="swatch" style="background:#0d6efd;"></span>Conferences</span>
<span><span class="swatch" style="background:#dc3545;"></span>Calls for Papers</span>
<span><span class="swatch" style="background:#BF5700;"></span>NIH Grant Deadlines</span>
<span><span class="swatch" style="background:rgba(13,202,240,0.1);border:1px solid #0dcaf0;"></span>Abstract Windows</span>
<span><span class="swatch" style="background:#fff9c4;border:1px solid #856404;"></span>Today</span>
</div>

<div id="fc-deadline-calendar"></div>

<script>
(function initFCCalendar() {{

if (typeof FullCalendar === 'undefined') {{
setTimeout(initFCCalendar,50);
return;
}}

var calendar = new FullCalendar.Calendar(
document.getElementById('fc-deadline-calendar'),
{{
initialView:'dayGridMonth',
initialDate:'{initial_date}',
height:'auto',

headerToolbar:{{
left:'prev,next today',
center:'title',
right:'dayGridMonth'
}},

eventOrderStrict:true,
eventOrder:function(a,b){{
var rank = {{
conference:0,
paper:1,
nih:2,
abstract:3
}};

var aRank = rank[a.extendedProps.rowType] ?? 99;
var bRank = rank[b.extendedProps.rowType] ?? 99;

if(aRank !== bRank) return aRank - bRank;
return a.title.localeCompare(b.title);
}},

events:{events_json},

eventClick:function(info){{
info.jsEvent.preventDefault();
var url = info.event.extendedProps.url;

if(url){{
var win = window.open(url,'_blank','noopener,noreferrer');
if(win) win.opener = null;
}}
}},

eventDidMount:function(info){{
var p = info.event.extendedProps;
var tip = info.event.title;

if(p.type) tip += '\\nType: ' + p.type;
if(p.detail) tip += '\\nDetail: ' + p.detail;
if(p.note) tip += '\\n' + p.note;

info.el.setAttribute('title',tip);
}}
}}
);

calendar.render();

}})();
</script>
"""
    return html

display(HTML(create_fullcalendar_html(conferences, call_for_papers, nih_grant_deadlines)))
```



### Global Map of Conferences

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

from ipyleaflet import Map, Marker, AwesomeIcon, Popup
from ipywidgets import HTML
import datetime

# Create a map centered on North America
m = Map(center=(20, 0), zoom=2)

# Conference data is imported from _conferences_data.py
from _conferences_data import conferences

# Get current date once for all comparisons
current_date = datetime.datetime.now()

# Sort conferences by start date and parse dates once to ensure correct ordering
sorted_conferences = sorted(conferences, key=lambda x: x["start_date"])

# Parse dates once for all conferences
conf_dates = {}
for conf in sorted_conferences:
    conf_dates[conf["name"]] = {
        "start": datetime.datetime.strptime(conf["start_date"], "%Y-%m-%d"),
        "end": datetime.datetime.strptime(conf["end_date"], "%Y-%m-%d")
    }

# Find the next 3 upcoming conferences (start date in the future)
upcoming_conferences = []
for conf in sorted_conferences:
    if conf_dates[conf["name"]]["start"] > current_date:
        upcoming_conferences.append(conf["name"])
    if len(upcoming_conferences) >= 3:
        break

# Add markers for each conference location
for conf in sorted_conferences:
    # Get pre-parsed dates
    conf_start_date = conf_dates[conf["name"]]["start"]
    conf_end_date = conf_dates[conf["name"]]["end"]
    
    # Determine marker color based on conference status
    if conf_end_date < current_date:
        # Past conferences - use beige for even lighter appearance
        marker_color = 'beige'
    elif conf["name"] in upcoming_conferences:
        # Next 3 upcoming conferences - use dark red
        marker_color = 'darkred'
    else:
        # Other future conferences - use regular red
        marker_color = 'red'
    
    icon = AwesomeIcon(
        name='calendar',
        marker_color=marker_color,
        icon_color='white'
    )
    marker = Marker(
        location=(conf["lat"], conf["lon"]),
        draggable=False,
        title=conf["name"],
        icon=icon
    )
    
    # Format dates for display
    start = conf_start_date.strftime("%B %d, %Y")
    end = conf_end_date.strftime("%B %d, %Y")
    
    # Add URL link if available
    url_html = f"<br><a href='{conf['url']}' target='_blank' style='color: #007bff;'>Website</a>" if 'url' in conf else ""
    
    marker.popup = HTML(
        value=f"<div style='width: 200px;'><b>{conf['name']}</b><br><i>{conf['type']}</i><br>{conf['location']}<br>{start} - {end}{url_html}</div>"
    )
    m.add_layer(marker)

m
```

### Conferences & Events

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime
import re

# Create a DataFrame for the conference calendar
calendar_data = []

for conf in conferences:
    start = datetime.strptime(conf["start_date"], "%Y-%m-%d")
    end = datetime.strptime(conf["end_date"], "%Y-%m-%d")
    
    # Format abstract submission dates
    abstract_open_str = "NA"
    abstract_close_str = "NA"
    if conf.get("abstract_open"):
        abstract_open = datetime.strptime(conf["abstract_open"], "%Y-%m-%d")
        abstract_open_str = abstract_open.strftime("%B %d, %Y")
    if conf.get("abstract_close"):
        abstract_close = datetime.strptime(conf["abstract_close"], "%Y-%m-%d")
        abstract_close_str = abstract_close.strftime("%B %d, %Y")
    
    calendar_data.append({
        "Event": conf["name"],
        "Location": conf["location"],
        "Abstract Open": abstract_open_str,
        "Abstract Close": abstract_close_str,
        "Abstract Note": conf.get("abstract_note", ""),
        "Start Date": start.strftime("%B %d, %Y"),
        "End Date": end.strftime("%B %d, %Y"),
        "URL": conf.get("url", ""),
        "Projects": conf.get("projects", []),
        "start_datetime": start,
        "end_datetime": end,
        "abstract_open_dt": datetime.strptime(conf["abstract_open"], "%Y-%m-%d") if conf.get("abstract_open") else None,
        "abstract_close_dt": datetime.strptime(conf["abstract_close"], "%Y-%m-%d") if conf.get("abstract_close") else None
    })

df = pd.DataFrame(calendar_data)
df = df.sort_values('start_datetime').reset_index(drop=True)

# Display as a styled table
from IPython.display import display, HTML

def create_calendar_html(df):
    current_date = datetime.now()
    
    # Find the next upcoming conference (first one with start date in the future)
    next_upcoming_idx = None
    for idx, row in df.iterrows():
        if row['start_datetime'] > current_date:
            next_upcoming_idx = idx
            break
    
    html = """
    <style>
        .calendar-table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            margin: 20px 0;
            font-size: 14px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .calendar-table thead tr {
            background-color: #007bff;
            color: white;
            text-align: left;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .calendar-table th,
        .calendar-table td {
            padding: 12px 15px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr {
            border-bottom: 1px solid #dddddd;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr:nth-of-type(even) {
            background-color: #f3f3f3;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr:hover {
            background-color: #e3f2fd;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr.past-conference {
            opacity: 0.5;
            background-color: #f9f9f9;
            color: #999;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr.past-conference:nth-of-type(even) {
            background-color: #f5f5f5;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr.next-upcoming {
            font-weight: bold;
            background-color: #fff3cd;
            border: 2px solid #ffc107;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr.next-upcoming:hover {
            background-color: #ffe69c;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr.submission-open {
            background-color: #d4edda !important;
            border-left: 4px solid #28a745;
        }
        .calendar-table tbody tr.submission-open:hover {
            background-color: #c3e6cb !important;
        }
        .abstract-note {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #666;
            font-style: italic;
        }
    </style>
    <table class="calendar-table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Event</th>
                <th>Location</th>
                <th>Start Date - End Date</th>
                <th>Abstract Submission</th>
                <th>Project</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
    """
    
    for idx, row in df.iterrows():
        url_link = f"<a href='{row['URL']}' target='_blank' style='color: #007bff;'>Visit</a>" if row['URL'] else ""
        
        # Determine row classes
        row_classes = []
        if row['end_datetime'] < current_date:
            row_classes.append("past-conference")
        if idx == next_upcoming_idx:
            row_classes.append("next-upcoming")
        
        # Check if abstract submission is currently open
        if row['abstract_open_dt'] and row['abstract_close_dt']:
            if row['abstract_open_dt'] <= current_date <= row['abstract_close_dt']:
                row_classes.append("submission-open")
        
        row_class_str = f" class='{' '.join(row_classes)}'" if row_classes else ""
        
        # Format Event column with Event name and URL link
        event_cell = f"<strong>{row['Event']}</strong>"
        
        # Add URL link on the second line if available
        if url_link:
            event_cell += f"<br>{url_link}"
        
        # Format Location column
        location_cell = row['Location']
        
        # Format conference dates column (merged start - end)
        conference_dates = f"{row['Start Date']} - {row['End Date']}"
        
        # Format abstract submission column (merged open - close)
        # Only bold dates when submission is currently open (green background)
        is_submission_open = (row['abstract_open_dt'] and row['abstract_close_dt'] and 
                             row['abstract_open_dt'] <= current_date <= row['abstract_close_dt'])
        
        # Check if abstracts are closed (current date past close date)
        if row['abstract_close_dt'] and current_date > row['abstract_close_dt']:
            abstract_submission = "Abstracts Closed"
        elif row['Abstract Open'] != "NA" and row['Abstract Close'] != "NA":
            if is_submission_open:
                abstract_submission = f"<strong>{row['Abstract Open']} - {row['Abstract Close']}</strong>"
            else:
                abstract_submission = f"{row['Abstract Open']} - {row['Abstract Close']}"
        elif row['Abstract Close'] != "NA":
            if is_submission_open:
                abstract_submission = f"<strong>{row['Abstract Close']}</strong>"
            else:
                abstract_submission = row['Abstract Close']
        elif row['Abstract Open'] != "NA":
            abstract_submission = row['Abstract Open']
        else:
            abstract_submission = "NA"
        
        if row['Abstract Note']:
            abstract_submission += f"<br><span class='abstract-note'>{row['Abstract Note']}</span>"
        
        # Add project links - support multiple project-specific links
        projects = row.get('Projects', [])
        if projects and isinstance(projects, list) and len(projects) > 0:
            project_links = []
            for project_url in projects:
                project_links.append(f"<a href='{project_url}' target='_blank' style='color: #007bff;'>Link</a>")
            project_cell = "<br>".join(project_links)
        else:
            project_cell = ""
        
        html += f"""
            <tr{row_class_str}>
                <td>{event_cell}</td>
                <td>{location_cell}</td>
                <td>{conference_dates}</td>
                <td>{abstract_submission}</td>
                <td>{project_cell}</td>
            </tr>
        """
    
    html += """
        </tbody>
    </table>
    """
    return html

display(HTML(create_calendar_html(df)))
```

and many more at:

- [**Cell Symposia**](https://www.cell.com/symposia)
- [**British Pharmacological Society**](https://my.bps.ac.uk/events/)
- [**Keystone Symposia**](https://www.keystonesymposia.org/)
- [**Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory**](https://meetings.cshl.edu/)
- [**Wellcome Trust**](https://coursesandconferences.wellcomeconnectingscience.org/our-events/conferences/)
- [**University of Texas**](https://research.utexas.edu/events)
- [**UT MD Anderson Cancer Center**](https://www.mdanderson.org/research/research-resources/conferences-seminars.html)
- [**Houston Methodist**](https://attend.houstonmethodist.org/)
- [**Baylor College of Medicine**](https://www.bcm.edu/departments/medicine/research/conferences-grand-rounds-seminars)
- [**UT School of Public Health**](https://sph.uth.edu/events/)
